seoTitle: Plumpton vs Point Clare — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Plumpton and Point Clare. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Plumpton vs Point Clare: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Plumpton and Point Clare.
heading: Plumpton vs Point Clare — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Plumpton, New South Wales and Point Clare, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Plumpton has a lower overall climate risk score (41/100) compared to Point Clare (43/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Plumpton or Point Clare safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Plumpton has a flood risk score of 44/100, while Point Clare scores 35/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Plumpton scores 57/100 for bushfire risk. Point Clare scores 41/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Plumpton or Point Clare?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Plumpton has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.95% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
